name: Metaswarm Knowledge Cycle - Self-Reflection
description: Extract learnings from completed work into the knowledge base before PR creation

evidence: Missing edge case for expired refresh token

knowledgeExtracted: Pattern: Always handle expired refresh tokens as a distinct code path
Gotcha: First attempt missed refresh token expiry edge case
Decision: Used RS256 over HS256 for JWT signing (asymmetric for microservice verification)
